creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Comment “Resort” and I’ll send you a link to check out this gorgeous resort!

Before we dive in be sure to follow @thefloridaqueenie for more amazing stays in Florida! 

If you want to really impress her, book a night here instead of getting her flowers (again)! I spent the dreamiest weekend at the JW Marriott Orlando Grande Lakes and I’m officially obsessed!

Think: luxe vibes, epic waterpark with a quarter mile long lazy river, water slides for the kids, (and adults who like to act like kids ), peaceful lagoons to relax in, and poolside restaurants and bars. 

From relaxing lagoons to Michelin-star meals poolside—this resort is a total gem just minutes from the theme parks!

Checkout out my Orlando Highlight for more details on it and follow me for more great places to stay in Florida! 

#JWMarriottOrlando #orlandoflorida #orlandovacation #floridaresort #marriott
